do: Use the SelectField wrapper for label / description / errorMessage / mandatory.
Compose options from SelectItem / SelectGroup / SelectLabel.
dont: Don't use Select for long or searchable option lists — use combobox.
Don't use Select to trigger actions — use dropdown-menu.

boundaries: Figma naming trap: the set named "Dropdown" on the Select page (node 1637:17676) IS this component; the set named "Select" on the dropdown-menu page (1292:5274) is combobox.

whenToUseInstead.when: many options or type-to-filter is needed
the items run actions instead of picking a form value
few options that should all stay visible
